task.objective: Add lastRunOnly parameter to database functions and fix data consistency issues
task.context:
Current state: - All queries aggregate ALL executions in time range - No function supports lastRunOnly parameter - Issue 5: Flakiness rate uses passed_runs as denominator (incorrect) - Issue 7: Latest execution uses started_at ordering (ambiguous for parallel runs)
Target state: - When lastRunOnly=true, filter metrics to most recent execution - Most recent execution determined by branch/suite filter - Flakiness rate uses total_runs as denominator (consistent) - Latest execution uses completed_at ordering (deterministic)

issue.name: Flakiness Denominator Inconsistency
issue.problem: flakiness_rate = flaky_runs / passed_runs (wrong - excludes failed runs)

issue.name: Latest Execution Selection Ambiguity
issue.problem: ORDER BY started_at DESC - parallel executions show wrong "latest"
issue.solution: ORDER BY completed_at DESC - deterministic selection

change.description: Add getLatestExecutionId helper function (Issue 7 fix: use completed_at)
Update getDashboardMetrics to support lastRunOnly and branch/suite filters
change.action: Inside the function: 1. Extract lastRunOnly, branch, suite from options (handle backward compat) 2. If lastRunOnly=true AND (branch OR suite), call getLatestExecutionId 3. Add branch/suite filters to all query conditions 4. Add execution_id filter when lastRunOnly 5. Update latestExecution query to use completed_at ordering

change.description: Issue 5 fix: Change flakiness_rate denominator from passed_runs to total_runs
change.before: flakiness_rate = CASE WHEN test_flakiness_history.passed_runs + ${status === "passed" ? 1 : 0} > 0 THEN ROUND( (test_flakiness_history.flaky_runs + ${isFlaky ? 1 : 0})::decimal / (test_flakiness_history.passed_runs + ${status === "passed" ? 1 : 0}) * 100, 2 ) ELSE 0 END,
change.after: -- Issue 5 fix: Use total_runs (not passed_runs) as denominator for consistent flakiness rate flakiness_rate = CASE WHEN test_flakiness_history.total_runs + 1 > 0 THEN ROUND( (test_flakiness_history.flaky_runs + ${isFlaky ? 1 : 0})::decimal / (test_flakiness_history.total_runs + 1) * 100, 2 ) ELSE 0 END,

change.description: Add executionId filter to getFlakiestTests for lastRunOnly support

change.add: executionId?: number // Filter to flaky tests from specific execution (for lastRunOnly mode)

change.description: Export new helper and type, update getQueriesForOrg
change.action: 1. Export getLatestExecutionId from metrics 2. Export type DashboardMetricsOptions from metrics 3. Import getLatestExecutionId and DashboardMetricsOptions 4. Update getDashboardMetrics in getQueriesForOrg to accept DashboardMetricsOptions 5. Add getLatestExecutionId to getQueriesForOrg return object

sql_patterns.pattern: -- Issue 7 fix: Use completed_at for deterministic ordering WITH latest_execution AS ( SELECT id FROM test_executions WHERE organization_id = $1 AND ($2::text IS NULL OR branch = $2) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR suite = $3) AND completed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT ... FROM test_results tr WHERE tr.execution_id = (SELECT id FROM latest_execution)
-- Issue 5 fix: Use total_runs as denominator flakiness_rate = flaky_runs / total_runs * 100 -- NOT: flaky_runs / passed_runs * 100 (incorrect)

testing.test: getLatestExecutionId returns correct ID for branch filter
getLatestExecutionId returns correct ID for suite filter
getLatestExecutionId returns null when no matches
getDashboardMetrics with lastRunOnly=true returns single execution data
getDashboardMetrics with lastRunOnly=false returns aggregated data
Run: npm run build (no TypeScript errors)

mandatory_final_step.action: Update status.md with phase completion including Issue 5 and Issue 7 fixes

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-03 - Add lastRunOnly parameter + Issue 5 & 7 fixes
